_meta.description: Bilingual response templates for deterministic editing UX microcopy.

what_you_should_review.en: Review target, diff, and formatting before applying.
what_you_should_review.pt: Revise alvo, diff e formatação antes de aplicar.

apply_undo_instructions.en: Apply commits the revision. Undo restores the previous revision and clears selection locks.
apply_undo_instructions.pt: Aplicar confirma a revisão. Desfazer restaura a revisão anterior e limpa os bloqueios de seleção.
